name: Get last 15 minutes
query:
SELECT 
  time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS quinze_min,
  (AVG(value) * 0.25) AS value_wh,
  slave_id
FROM consumption_realtime
WHERE slave_id IN {{{ msg.payload.devices }}}
  AND timestamp >= '{{{ msg.payload.dateStart }}}'
GROUP BY quinze_min, slave_id
ORDER BY quinze_min DESC;

name: Add namespace
Add namespace
Get last 15 minutes
query:
SELECT 
  time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS quinze_min,
  (AVG(value) * 0.25) AS value_wh,
  slave_id
FROM consumption_realtime
WHERE slave_id IN {{{ msg.payload.devices }}}
  AND timestamp >= '{{{ msg.payload.dateStart }}}'
  AND timestamp < '2025-04-01T22:00:00.000Z'
  AND slave_id = 168
GROUP BY quinze_min, slave_id
ORDER BY quinze_min DESC;

name: Queue

query:
SELECT
    time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS consumption_date,                           
    SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh, 
    COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)) AS total_hours, 
    (SUM(value) / 1000) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp)), 0) AS hours_per_kwh
FROM
    consumption_realtime
WHERE
slave_id = {{ msg.payload }}
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
GROUP BY
    consumption_date                       
ORDER BY
    consumption_date;

SELECT
    time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS day,
    MIN(min_hourly_value)/1000 AS min_daily_demand,
    MAX(max_hourly_value)/1000 AS max_daily_demand
FROM (
    SELECT
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS timestamp,
        MIN(value) AS min_hourly_value,
        MAX(value) AS max_hourly_value
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = {{ msg.payload }}
        AND timestamp
    BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
        AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp)
) AS hourly_data
GROUP BY
    day
ORDER BY
    day;

WITH hourly_data AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS hour,
        AVG(value) AS hourly_avg
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id IN ({{ msg.payload }})
        AND timestamp BETWEEN 
            TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
            AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        slave_id, hour
),
daily_sums AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('day', hour) AS day,
        slave_id,
        SUM(hourly_avg) / 1000 AS daily_sum_kwh
    FROM
        hourly_data
    GROUP BY
        DATE_TRUNC('day', hour),
        slave_id
)
SELECT
    day,
    SUM(daily_sum_kwh) AS total_daily_consumption_kwh,
    AVG(daily_sum_kwh) AS avg_daily_sum_kwh,
    MIN(daily_sum_kwh) AS min_daily_sum_kwh,
    MAX(daily_sum_kwh) AS max_daily_sum_kwh
FROM 
    daily_sums
GROUP BY
    day
ORDER BY
    day;

name: Consumption per device in a range.

query:
WITH hourly_data AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS hour,
        AVG(value) AS hourly_avg
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id IN ({{ msg.payload }})
        AND timestamp BETWEEN 
            TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
            AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        slave_id, hour
)
SELECT
    hd.slave_id,
    s.name AS device_name,
    SUM(hd.hourly_avg) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM 
    hourly_data hd
JOIN 
    slaves s ON s.id = hd.slave_id
GROUP BY
    hd.slave_id,
    s.name
ORDER BY
    hd.slave_id;

name: Consumption per specific device in range

query:
WITH hourly_data AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS hour,
        AVG(value) AS hourly_avg
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id = {{ msg.slaveId }}
        AND timestamp BETWEEN 
            TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
            AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        slave_id, hour
),
multiplier_cte AS (
    SELECT
        s.id AS slave_id,
        COALESCE(
            (SELECT (regexp_matches(s.name, 'x([0-9]+)A'))[1]::numeric),
            1
        ) AS multiplier
    FROM slaves s
    WHERE s.id = {{ msg.slaveId }}
)
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', hd.hour) AS day,
    AVG(hd.hourly_avg * m.multiplier) / 1000 AS avg_consumption,
    MIN(hd.hourly_avg * m.multiplier) / 1000 AS min_consumption,
    MAX(hd.hourly_avg * m.multiplier) / 1000 AS max_consumption,
    SUM(hd.hourly_avg * m.multiplier) / 1000 AS total_consumption
FROM 
    hourly_data hd
JOIN
    multiplier_cte m ON m.slave_id = hd.slave_id
GROUP BY
    DATE_TRUNC('day', hd.hour)
ORDER BY
    day;

WITH hourly_data AS (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS hour,
        AVG(value) AS hourly_avg
    FROM
        consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id IN ({{ msg.payload }})
        AND timestamp BETWEEN 
            TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
            AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
    GROUP BY
        slave_id, hour
)
SELECT
    hd.slave_id,
    s.name AS device_name,
    -- Extract multiplier from device name (e.g., x400A -> 400), default to 1 if not found
    SUM(hd.hourly_avg) / 1000 * 
        COALESCE(
            NULLIF(
                REGEXP_REPLACE(s.name, '^.*x([0-9]+)A.*$', '\1'),
                s.name
            )::numeric,
            1
        ) AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM 
    hourly_data hd
JOIN 
    slaves s ON s.id = hd.slave_id
GROUP BY
    hd.slave_id,
    s.name
ORDER BY
    hd.slave_id;

name: Send status
Set slaves
func:
msg.slaves = msg.payload.map((slave) => slave.id);

return msg;

query:
SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', cr.timestamp)    AS timestamp,
  cr.slave_id,
  AVG(cr.value * 
    COALESCE(
      -- Extract multiplier from slave name using regex
      -- Match patterns like "x400A", "x400.28A", "x400" but NOT "x400V"
      CASE 
        WHEN s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)[^V]' OR s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)$'
        THEN (regexp_match(s.name, 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)'))[1]::float
        ELSE 1
      END,
      1
    )
  )          AS value,
  AVG(cr.value_reactive * 
    COALESCE(
      -- Apply same multiplier to reactive power
      CASE 
        WHEN s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)[^V]' OR s.name ~ 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)$'
        THEN (regexp_match(s.name, 'x([0-9]+\.?[0-9]*)'))[1]::float
        ELSE 1
      END,
      1
    )
  ) AS value_reactive
FROM consumption_realtime cr
JOIN slaves s
  ON cr.slave_id = s.id
WHERE
      -- start *after* the bucket containing last_ts
      cr.timestamp >  ('{{{ msg.payload.last_energy_ts }}}'::timestamptz
                       + INTERVAL '5 minutes')
  AND cr.timestamp <= ('{{{ msg.payload.last_energy_ts }}}'::timestamptz
                       + INTERVAL '1 hour')
  AND (cr.value / 3.0) <= (
    CASE COALESCE(s.clamp_type::text, '0')
      WHEN '0' THEN 50
      WHEN '1' THEN 100
      WHEN '2' THEN 400
      WHEN '3' THEN 1000
      WHEN '4' THEN 2000
      WHEN '5' THEN 1600
      WHEN '6' THEN 1000
      ELSE 0
    END * 220
  )
GROUP BY timestamp, cr.slave_id
ORDER BY timestamp, cr.slave_id;

name: function 11

query:
WITH raw_ts AS (
  -- 1) use exactly what the cloud sent, or fall back to the first 2023+ reading
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF('{{{ msg.payload.last_water_ts }}}','')::timestamptz,
      (
        SELECT MIN(timestamp)
          FROM channel_pulse_log
         WHERE timestamp > '2025-01-01T00:00:00Z'
           AND channel   = 1
      )
    ) AS start_ts
),
channel_info AS (
  -- 2) lookup your per-slave multiplier
  SELECT
    slave_id,
    MAX(
      COALESCE(
        (regexp_match(name, 'x([0-9]+\\.?[0-9]*)'))[1]::float,
        1
      )
    ) AS multiplier
  FROM channels
  WHERE channel = 1
    AND type    = 'flow_sensor'
    AND slave_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY slave_id
),
bounds AS (
  -- 3) from that start_ts, either take a full hour (if there's data),
  --    or jump to the end of the very next non‐empty 5m bucket
  SELECT
    r.start_ts,
    CASE
      WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
          FROM channel_pulse_log c
          JOIN channel_info ci ON c.slave_id = ci.slave_id
         WHERE c.timestamp >  r.start_ts
           AND c.timestamp <= r.start_ts + INTERVAL '1 hour'
           AND c.channel   = 1
           AND c.value     > 0
           AND c.value     < 10000
      )
      THEN r.start_ts + INTERVAL '1 hour'
      ELSE (
        SELECT MIN(time_bucket('5 minutes', c2.timestamp) + INTERVAL '5 minutes')
          FROM channel_pulse_log c2
          JOIN channel_info ci2 ON c2.slave_id = ci2.slave_id
         WHERE c2.timestamp > r.start_ts
           AND c2.channel   = 1
           AND c2.value     > 0
           AND c2.value     < 10000
      )
    END AS end_ts
  FROM raw_ts r
),
main_data AS (
  -- 4) aggregate _all_ pulses in that (start_ts, end_ts] window
  SELECT
    time_bucket('5 minutes', c.timestamp)  AS bucket_start,
    c.slave_id,
    SUM(c.value)                            AS sum_value,
    (SUM(c.value) * ci.multiplier) / 1000   AS value
  FROM channel_pulse_log c
  JOIN channel_info    ci ON c.slave_id = ci.slave_id
  JOIN bounds          b  ON TRUE
  WHERE
        c.timestamp >  b.start_ts
    AND c.timestamp <= b.end_ts
    AND c.channel   = 1
    AND c.value     > 0
    AND c.value     < 10000
  GROUP BY bucket_start, c.slave_id, ci.multiplier
)
-- 5) return exactly one row _and_ use end_ts as the returned timestamp
SELECT
  (SELECT end_ts FROM bounds) AS timestamp,
  slave_id,
  sum_value,
  value,
  1                            AS channel
FROM main_data
ORDER BY timestamp DESC, slave_id
LIMIT 1;

name: function 13
Get last 15 minutes
query:
SELECT 
  time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS quinze_min,
  (AVG(value) * 0.25) AS value_wh,
  slave_id
FROM consumption_realtime
WHERE slave_id IN {{{ msg.payload.devices }}}
  AND timestamp >= '{{{ msg.payload.dateStart }}}'
GROUP BY quinze_min, slave_id
ORDER BY quinze_min DESC;

SELECT 
    c.slave_id,
    c.channel,
    c.name AS channel_name,
    s.name AS slave_name,
    MAX(cpl.timestamp) AS last_reading
FROM 
    channels c
LEFT JOIN 
    channel_pulse_log cpl ON c.slave_id = cpl.slave_id AND c.channel = cpl.channel
LEFT JOIN 
    slaves s ON c.slave_id = s.id
WHERE 
    c.name LIKE 'Hidr.%'
  AND c.slave_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    c.slave_id, c.channel, c.name, s.name
HAVING 
    MAX(cpl.timestamp) < NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours'
    OR MAX(cpl.timestamp) IS NULL;

SELECT 
    s.id AS slave_id,
    s.name AS slave_name,
    MAX(cr.timestamp) AS last_reading
FROM 
    slaves s
LEFT JOIN 
    consumption_realtime cr ON s.id = cr.slave_id
WHERE 
    s.type = 'three_phase_sensor'
GROUP BY 
    s.id, s.name
HAVING 
    MAX(cr.timestamp) < NOW() - INTERVAL '72 hours'
    OR MAX(cr.timestamp) IS NULL;
